title: tithymalus luridus
intro: Tithymalus luridus, also known as Euphorbia lathyris, is a species of succulent plant in the spurge family, Euphorbiaceae. The plant contains a toxic milky sap, which has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. Tithymalus luridus has been used to treat various health issues, such as skin conditions, wounds, and even certain types of cancer, due to its potential to inhibit tumor growth and reduce inflammation. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, including ointments, salves, and tinctures, which can be applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
